name: gate token explanation — protocol compliance (no tool use)
task_prompt: Write a one-paragraph explanation of the gate token satisfying this rubric: (1) every claim must name a specific string from a prior result, (2) no prose assertion of satisfaction is permitted, (3) the paragraph must be 5 sentences or fewer. No test runner is available. Produce prose only.
notes: Non-software frame. Tests Frame 22: rubric criterion before prose; inline violation marker before revision; completion check confirms no markers remain.
